scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.check: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck && npm run test --workspace backend && npm run build
